title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Meritnation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Meritnation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Meritnation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Meritnation:
Meritnation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meritnation!
